ddls:
CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade level */,
  "grade_name" TEXT /* Name of the grade level (e.g., Grade 1, Grade 2) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the grade level, including the general requirements and focus areas */,
  "required_skills" TEXT /* List of required skills for each grade level */,
  "assessment_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used to assess student compositions at this grade level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compositions" (
  "composition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each composition */,
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grade level the composition is associated with */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who created the composition */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the composition */,
  "length_bars" INTEGER /* Length of the composition in bars */,
  "time_signature" TEXT /* Time signature of the composition */,
  "keys" TEXT /* Key signatures used in the composition */,
  "other_features" TEXT /* Other features and elements included in the composition, such as note values, rests, and dynamics */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the composition was submitted */,
  "revision_count" INTEGER /* Number of revisions made to the composition */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Instructor feedback on the composition */,
  "performance录音_url" TEXT /* URL to an audio recording of the performance */,
  "score_pdf_url" TEXT /* URL to a PDF of the musical score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("composition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compositions_grade_id FOREIGN KEY ("grade_id") REFERENCES grades ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compositions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current grade level the student is in */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor assigned to the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the program */,
  "progress_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the student's overall progress */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_grade_id FOREIGN KEY ("grade_id") REFERENCES grades ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization area of the instructor (e.g., piano, violin) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the instructor (e.g., teacher, mentor, administrator) */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years the instructor has been teaching */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Instructor's available hours for teaching and consultation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)
